top_signals.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
top_signals.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Natural Gas Drops on Cooler Outlooks, New Pipeline Capacity
top_signals.summary: US natural gas futures declined as forecasts shifted to show cooler weather in the coming weeks, suggesting a decline in demand for gas-fired electricity as consumers pull back on using air-conditioners. Kinder Morgan’s Gulf Coast Express pipeline expansion project also entered service, indicating more gas will be moving out of the oversupplied Permian Basin into surrounding regions instead of being flared.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nearly 100 Catholic leaders oppose Clarity Act over weakened safeguards against illicit finance and trafficking
top_signals.summary: The Alliance to End Human Trafficking, which is supported by Catholic organizations, pushed back against the sweeping cryptocurrency bill.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
